sourceMovie.title: That Christmas
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto That Christmas (2024) as a animation theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The animation and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Klaus
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If That Christmas clicked for you, Klaus (2019) is a strong next stop: both trade in animation and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after That Christmas?
faq.answer: Try Klaus, The Star, The Christmas Chronicles—each shares DNA with That Christmas while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is That Christmas?
faq.answer: That Christmas (2024) is best described as Animation, Comedy, Family, Fantasy, Adventure. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is That Christmas worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.2/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this animation lane.
